headline: CBRE Group (CBRE) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: CBRE Group stock overview CBRE Group (CBRE) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock roughly flat over the past week but down around 12% over the past month and 10% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for CBRE Group. Despite the recent share price decline of around 12% over the past month and 10% over three months, CBRE Group still shows stronger long term momentum, with a 1 year total shareholder return of 8.2% and a 3 year total shareholder return...
